- DONE Finances meeting with Marco
  - #### Inputs
  - ![KnowherePrevious.pdf](../assets/KnowherePrevious_1706709691210_0.pdf)
  - [ChatGPT

  - main daily driver (openai.com)](https://chat.openai.com/g/g-QjexzLwl7-structured-exploration-main-daily-driver/c/43c2aa80-a317-40b2-b842-283611fceb62)

  - [MITIH_ Risk Register .docx](../assets/MITIH_Risk_Register_1706695247428_0.docx)

  - [InnnovateUK Company Finance workbook (1).xlsm](../assets/InnnovateUK_Company_Finance_workbook_(1)_1706695277680_0.xlsm)
  - ### Things to sort
  - ### Needs an external accountant for the due diligence.
  - This needs to be paid for.
  - **Timing**
  - April May start time, run to December?
  - Calendar Quarterly invoicing with no latency paid by the Landing. Invoicing
  - Evidence all of the subcontractor, time sheeting.
  - Consider taking on the PAYE for simple accounting simplicity. The BAU vs the project can be gnarly.
  - **Collaborator list**
  - FuzzyDuck
    - It's claim in arrears.
    - FuzzyDuck match fund approx £20k?
    - Fuzzyduck NEEDS to have £30k in the bank to cover the match fund at bid time.
    - Subcontract should be Manchester based (percentages).
    - The other funders (future things) can then slice into this across the project.
  - Immersive
    - Location based events product analysis for approx £7k
  - Badger and Coombes
    - Attention tracking in live sports events £3k to develop product pack
  - Co-investment needs to be £100k from a major over 5 years, as a commitment that isn't necessarily serviced.
    - Microsoft?
    - James knows.
    - Nvidia? Talk to Pete.
    - Anyone who has invested in the project up to this point counts against the £200k
    - That can be a live project.
  - Put hardware under materials not capital depreciation
